requirement_topic.en: ART Mandatory Homologation — Radio / Telecom Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: ART强制同质化认证——无线电/电信终端设备
requirement_topic.zht: ART強制同質化認證——無線電/電信終端設備

summary.en: All radio and telecommunications terminal equipment placed on the Cameroonian market must hold a valid homologation certificate issued by ART (Agence de Régulation des Télécommunications) under Loi n°2010/013 du 21 décembre 2010 régissant les communications électroniques au Cameroun. The homologation certificate number must appear on the product or its packaging. CE and FCC marks are not recognised by ART as equivalent. Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and IoT devices with radio functionality are all in scope. ART manages spectrum and issues the homologation approval; CEMAC regional harmonisation is progressing but does not yet substitute for national ART homologation. Products must carry bilingual French and English labelling reflecting Cameroon's official bilingual status.
summary.zh: 所有投放喀麦隆市场的无线电及电信终端设备，须持有依据《2010年12月21日第2010/013号电子通信法》由ART（喀麦隆电信监管局）颁发的有效同质化证书。产品或其包装上须显示同质化证书编号。ART不承认CE和FCC标志作为等效认可。Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝及具有无线电功能的物联网设备均在适用范围内。ART负责频谱管理并颁发同质化批准；CEMAC区域协调进程正在推进，但尚不能替代国家层面的ART同质化认证。产品须采用法英双语标注，以反映喀麦隆官方双语国家地位。
summary.zht: 所有投放喀麥隆市場的無線電及電信終端設備，須持有依據《2010年12月21日第2010/013號電子通信法》由ART（喀麥隆電信監管局）頒發的有效同質化證書。產品或其包裝上須顯示同質化證書編號。ART不承認CE和FCC標誌作為等效認可。Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩及具有無線電功能的物聯網裝置均在適用範圍內。ART負責頻譜管理並頒發同質化批准；CEMAC區域協調進程正在推進，但尚不能替代國家層面的ART同質化認證。產品須採用法英雙語標注，以反映喀麥隆官方雙語國家地位。

standards_or_laws: Loi n°2010/013 du 21 décembre 2010 régissant les communications électroniques au Cameroun
ART Homologation Certificate (certificate number on product/packaging required)
Bilingual French and English product labelling (Cameroon official languages)

summary.en: Chinese wireless devices typically hold SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) radio type approval from MIIT, a MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) for terminal equipment, and CCC certification for RF components in scope under GB standards. These Chinese approvals have no mutual recognition with ART Cameroon.
summary.zh: 中国无线设备通常持有工业和信息化部（MIIT）颁发的SRRC无线电型式核准、电信终端设备的MIIT网络接入许可（NAL）以及适用GB标准范围内射频组件的CCC认证。上述中国认可与喀麦隆ART之间不存在相互承认协议。
summary.zht: 中國無線設備通常持有工業和資訊化部（MIIT）頒發的SRRC無線電型式核准、電信終端設備的MIIT網路接入許可（NAL）以及適用GB標準範圍內射頻組件的CCC認證。上述中國認可與喀麥隆ART之間不存在相互承認協議。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) for terminal equipment
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for in-scope RF components

gap.en: Full gap: Chinese SRRC, NAL, and CCC approvals are not recognised by ART Cameroon. A separate ART homologation application must be submitted. The homologation certificate number must appear on all units placed on the Cameroonian market. Bilingual French and English labelling is required. There is no operative CEMAC mutual recognition arrangement that bridges this gap for wireless equipment as of 2026.
gap.zh: 完全差距：中国的SRRC、NAL及CCC认可均不被喀麦隆ART承认。须单独提交ART同质化申请。投放喀麦隆市场的所有产品须显示同质化证书编号。须采用法英双语标注。截至2026年，不存在可弥补无线设备领域差距的有效CEMAC相互承认安排。
gap.zht: 完全差距：中國的SRRC、NAL及CCC認可均不被喀麥隆ART承認。須單獨提交ART同質化申請。投放喀麥隆市場的所有產品須顯示同質化證書編號。須採用法英雙語標注。截至2026年，不存在可彌補無線設備領域差距的有效CEMAC相互承認安排。

source.publisher: ART — Agence de Régulation des Télécommunications (Cameroun)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese SRRC / NAL / CCC approvals do not satisfy ART Cameroon homologation requirements. A separate ART homologation certificate must be obtained and the certificate number displayed on product/packaging before placing wireless or telecom terminal equipment on the Cameroonian market. Bilingual French and English labelling is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC / NAL / CCC认可不满足喀麦隆ART同质化认证要求。在将无线或电信终端设备投放喀麦隆市场前，须单独取得ART同质化证书，并在产品/包装上显示证书编号。须采用法英双语标注。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC / NAL / CCC認可不滿足喀麥隆ART同質化認證要求。在將無線或電信終端設備投放喀麥隆市場前，須單獨取得ART同質化證書，並在產品/包裝上顯示證書編號。須採用法英雙語標注。
